summary: All requirements have been successfully implemented. LinkedIn Insight Tag and Meta Pixel base code are installed in frontend/index.html with placeholder IDs. LinkedIn conversion tracking is implemented across all specified user actions (advisory application, strategy call clicks, toolkit purchase, checklist download) using a centralized tracking utility. CSP headers are updated to allow LinkedIn and Meta domains. Comprehensive setup documentation (TRACKING_SETUP.md) is created with step-by-step instructions for configuring partner IDs, conversion IDs, and pixel IDs.

hallucinated_features.description: Centralized tracking utility file (frontend/src/lib/tracking.ts) with TypeScript definitions and helper function trackLinkedInConversion
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest did not specify creating a centralized tracking utility module. Requirements only mentioned implementing conversion tracking in specific components, not abstracting it into a separate utility file.
